cosmic-void.$description: Cosmic Void — Primary page background and hero fill — the violet undertone separates it from neutral black, making darkness feel galactic rather than empty

abyssal-blue.$description: Abyssal Blue — Secondary surface backgrounds, button background variant — a step lighter than Cosmic Void for subtle depth layering

steel-navy.$description: Steel Navy — Card surfaces, nav background, interactive container backgrounds

deep-slate.$description: Deep Slate — Elevated card or hover state backgrounds

mist.$description: Mist — Primary body text, general UI text — slightly blue-gray rather than pure white, reducing harshness against the dark void backgrounds

fog.$description: Fog — Borders, dividers, icon strokes throughout the UI

ghost-white.$description: Ghost White — Heading text at maximum contrast

ice-blue.$description: Ice Blue — High-brightness text on dark surfaces, link contrast text

portal-blue.$description: Portal Blue — Hyperlinks, inline text links — the single fully saturated accent visible in body content, connecting to Midjourney's Discord/community ecosystem

bioluminescent-green.$description: Bioluminescent Green — Sign Up pill button background (20% opacity tint) — deep green specimen glow against void

terminal-amber.$description: Terminal Amber — Explore pill button background (20% opacity tint) — amber specimen variant

crimson-depth.$description: Crimson Depth — Log In pill button background (20% opacity tint) — deep red specimen variant

specimen-green.$description: Specimen Green — Icon strokes and decorative SVG fills — vivid but used sparingly in iconography only

warning-amber.$description: Warning Amber — Icon and UI accent strokes — section heading icons (Projects ⚙, About ℹ)

fault-red.$description: Fault Red — Icon strokes, error-adjacent SVG fills

jetbrains-mono.$description: Every typographic role on this site — navigation labels, body copy, headings, buttons, links. Using a monospace font as the universal typeface (not just for code) makes the entire interface read as an active terminal output. 30px at lineHeight 1.25 serves section headings; 16px at 1.50 serves body and UI labels; 14px at 1.63 serves captions and metadata.

dm-sans.$description: Secondary UI copy and body text in prose sections — appears at 16px only. Weight 500 for emphasis within body blocks. Provides a subtle humanist contrast against the monospace primary, used sparingly so the terminal character of JetBrains Mono dominates.

cosmic-void.$description: Surface level 0: Base page background — the deepest layer, the void all other surfaces float within

deep-navy-gradient.$description: Surface level 1: Upper-hero gradient terminus, slightly lighter for atmospheric depth illusion

abyssal-blue.$description: Surface level 2: Button container backgrounds, secondary surface areas

steel-navy.$description: Surface level 3: Navigation bar background, card container backgrounds

deep-slate.$description: Surface level 4: Elevated or hover-state surfaces
